name: Brazilian Iced Chocolate - with Coke
recipeIngredient: Whipped cream or vanilla ice cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler over hot water, melt chocolate squares.
2. Stir in sugar.
3. Gradually stir in hot coffee, mixing thoroughly.
4. Add milk and continue cooking until all particles of chocolate are dissolved and mixture is smooth (about 10 minutes).
5. Pour into a jar. Cover and chill.
6. When ready to serve, stir in chilled Coca-Cola.
7. Serve over ice cubes in tall glasses.
8. For a beverage, top with whipped cream.
9. For a dessert, add a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
